source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And this is my little brother George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Mrs. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: He is Mr. Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 je4 je2 dik1 syun4
cards.english: [Grandpa Pig's Boat]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 zyu1 je4 je4 tung4 zyu1 maa4 maa4
cards.english: Today, Grandpa Pig and Grandma Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: daai3 tung4 jau4 syun4 ho2
cards.english: are taking Peppa and George on a boat trip.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: sam1 gon1 bou2 bui3 fun1 jing4 soeng6 syun4 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 你哋快啲着好件救生衣先啦
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 faai3 di1 zoek6 hou2 gin6 gau3 sang1 ji1 sin1 laa1
cards.english: You two quickly put on your life jackets first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: tung4
cards.english: Peppa and George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 每次上豬爺爺艘船都一定要着救生衣
cards.jyutping: mui5 ci3 soeng5 zyu1 je4 je2 sau2 syun4 dou1 jat1 ding6 jiu3 zoek6 gau3 sang1 ji1
cards.english: Each time they get on Grandpa Pig's boat, they must wear a life jacket.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 喺呢艘船上面我…就係船長
cards.jyutping: hai2 ne1 sau2 syun4 soeng6 min6 ngo5 zau6 hai6 syun4 zoeng2
cards.english: On this boat, I... am the captain.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: zi1 dou3 laa3 syun4 zoeng2
cards.english: Yes, Captain.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: zi1 dou3 laa3 syun4 zoeng2
cards.english: Yes, Captain.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 假如爺爺船長吩咐你哋做嘢嘅話
cards.jyutping: gaa2 jyu4 je4 je2 syun4 zoeng2 fan1 fu6 nei5 dei6 zou6 je5 ge3 waa2
cards.english: If Grandpa Captain asks you to do something,

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 zau6 jiu3 ziu3 zou6
cards.english: You have to do it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 so4 si6 zau6 ho2 ji5 m4 lei5
cards.english: But you can ignore silly things.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 爺爺船長絕對唔會叫人做傻事㗎
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 syun4 zoeng2 zyut6 deoi3 m4 wui6 giu3 jan4 zou6 so4 si6 gaa4
cards.english: Grandpa Captain would never ask anyone to do silly things.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: gam2 dong1 jin4 laa1 je4 je2 syun4 zoeng2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: sing1 kei4 laa1
cards.english: George, raise the flag!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: hoeng2 zung1 laa1
cards.english: Peppa, ring the bell!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: zi1 dou3 laa3 syun4 zoeng2
cards.english: Yes, Captain.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: maa4 maa4 nei5 ne1 fu6 zaak3 zoeng2 to4
cards.english: Grandma, you're in charge of the helm.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: zi1 dou3 laa3 syun4 zoeng2
cards.english: Yes, Captain.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: hei2 hong4
cards.english: Set sail!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: hei2 hong4
cards.english: Set sail!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 不如減慢速度，駛慢啲啦，爺爺
cards.jyutping: bat1 jyu4 gaam2 maan6 cuk1 dou6 sai2 maan6 di1 laa1 je4 je2
cards.english: How about slowing down, sailing a bit slower, Grandpa?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 嫲嫲，你呢個主意好好啊
cards.jyutping: maa4 maa4 nei5 ni1 go3 zyu2 ji3 hou2 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Grandma, that's a great idea.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 我都唔想咁快用晒啲汽油啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 m4 soeng2 gam3 faai3 jung6 saai3 di1 hei3 jau4 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 爺爺，我想艘船駛快啲喎
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 ngo5 soeng2 sau2 syun4 sai2 faai3 di1 wo3
cards.english: Grandpa, I want the boat to go faster.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: fong3 sam1 laa1
cards.english: Don't worry, Peppa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jat1 zan6 zoi3 sai2 faai3 di1
cards.english: We'll go faster later.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 jau5 ling6 jat1 sau2 syun4 laa3
cards.english: Look, there's another boat!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 佢就係狗爺爺，佢帶住Danny出嚟遊船河
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 gau2 je4 je4 keoi5 daai3 zyu6 ceot1 lei4 jau4 syun4 ho2

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa1 maa1 gau2 je4 je4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 gei2 hou2 aa1 maa1 zyu1 je4 je4

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2
cards.english: Danny, hello!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2
cards.english: Peppa, hello!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 狗爺爺係豬爺爺嘅好朋友嚟㗎
cards.jyutping: gau2 je4 je4 hai6 zyu1 je4 je4 ge3 hou2 pang4 jau5 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: Grandpa Dog is a good friend of Grandpa Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 真係估唔到 你艘船到而家仲行到喎，狗爺爺
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 gu2 m4 dou3 nei5 sau2 syun4 dou3 ji4 gaa1 zung6 hong6 dou3 wo3 gau2 je4 je4
cards.english: I really didn't expect that your boat could still sail, Grandpa Dog.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 佢同你都差唔多咁上下年紀㗎喇
cards.jyutping: keoi5 tung4 nei5 dou1 caa1 m4 do1 gam3 soeng6 haa2 nin4 gei2 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: It's about the same age as you!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: zung2 zi1 ngo5 ne1 sau2 gau6 syun4
cards.english: Regardless, this old boat of mine

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 點都行得快過你架生鏽船啦，豬爺爺
cards.jyutping: dim2 dou1 hong6 dak1 faai3 gwo3 nei5 gaa3 saang1 sau3 syun4 laa1 zyu1 je4 je4
cards.english: will definitely be faster than your rusty boat, Grandpa Pig!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: gam2 hou2 aa1 nei5 ne1 zek3 hoi2 gau2 aa1
cards.english: Alright then, you old sea dog!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 dau3 gwo3 laa1
cards.english: Let's have a race.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 syu1 gang2 dou1 dak1 laa3 seoi2 pei4 zyu1

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 你兩個嘅表現成個小朋友噉啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 loeng5 go3 ge3 biu2 jin6 sing4 go3 siu2 pang4 jau5 gam2 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 狗爺爺佢頭先叫我做水皮豬啊
cards.jyutping: gau2 je4 je4 keoi5 tau4 sin1 giu3 ngo5 zou6 seoi2 pei4 zyu1 aa3

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 不過係你叫人做海狗先㗎，爺爺
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 hai6 nei5 giu3 jan4 zou6 hoi2 gau2 sin1 gaa4 je4 je2
cards.english: But you called him a sea dog first, Grandpa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 jing1 goi1 tung4 keoi5 dou6 hip3 aa3
cards.english: You should apologize to him.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 好吖，除非佢同我道歉先啦
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa1 ceoi4 fei1 keoi5 tung4 ngo5 dou6 hip3 sin1 laa1
cards.english: Okay, if he apologizes to me first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 爺爺，你同豬爺爺佢道歉吖
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 nei5 tung4 zyu1 je4 je2 keoi5 dou6 hip3 aa1
cards.english: Grandpa, apologize to Grandpa Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 hou2 pang4 jau5 lai4 gaa4
cards.english: You two are good friends.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: m4 zai3 keoi5 hai6 zek3 seoi2 pei4 zyu1
cards.english: No way, he's a lousy pig!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 我艘船一定會快過佢㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 sau2 syun4 jat1 ding6 wui6 faai3 gwo3 keoi5 gaa4
cards.english: My boat will definitely be faster than his!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: hai6 gam2 hou2 laa1 hoi2 gau2
cards.english: That's fine then, sea dog!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 我哋就鬥快去到嗰條橋度啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zau6 dau3 faai3 heoi3 dou3 go2 tiu4 kiu4 dou6 laa1
cards.english: Let's race to that bridge then.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zau6 sou2 saam1 seng1
cards.english: We'll count to three then!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: jat1 ji6
cards.english: One, two...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ceot1 faat3
cards.english: Go!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 tau1 bou6 aa3 gau2 je4 je4
cards.english: You jumped the gun, Grandpa Dog!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 si3 haa6 deoi1 ngo5 laa1 seoi2 pei4 zyu1
cards.english: Try and catch me, you lousy pig!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: hoi2 gau2
cards.english: Sea dog!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 你艘船淨係得咁快㗎喳？
cards.jyutping: nei5 sau2 syun4 zing6 hai6 dak1 gam3 faai3 gaa4 caa1
cards.english: Is that as fast as your boat goes?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 deoi1 ngo5 m4 dou3 gaa4
cards.english: You can't catch me!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jeng4 laa3
cards.english: I won!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 弊喇，豬爺爺艘船冇晒油喇
cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3 zyu1 je4 je2 sau2 syun4 mou5 saai3 jau4 laa3
cards.english: Oh no, Grandpa Pig's boat ran out of gas!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 cung1 ming4 aa3 je4 je2 syun4 zoeng2
cards.english: Very smart, Grandpa Captain.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 可能我真係駛得太快喇
cards.jyutping: ho2 nang4 ngo5 zan1 hai6 sai2 dak1 taai3 faai3 laa3
cards.english: Maybe I really did drive too fast.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 dim2 faan1 heoi3 aa3
cards.english: How are we going to get back?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 gau2 je4 je2 lai4 gan2 laa3
cards.english: Look, Grandpa Dog is coming.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 狗爺爺可以拖我哋返去㗎喎
cards.jyutping: gau2 je4 je4 ho2 ji5 to1 ngo5 dei6 faan1 heoi3 gaa4 wo3
cards.english: Grandpa Dog can tow us back.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 我係唔會畀嗰隻海狗拖我哋返去㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6 m4 wui6 bei2 go2 zek3 hoi2 gau2 to1 ngo5 dei6 faan1 heoi3 gaa4
cards.english: I'm not letting that sea dog tow us back!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 我都一樣唔會幫手拖隻水皮豬走㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 jat1 joeng6 m4 wui6 bong1 sau2 to1 zek3 seoi2 pei4 zyu1 zau2 gaa4
cards.english: I'm not going to help tow a lousy pig either!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 你哋兩個真係一個大細路嚟
cards.jyutping: nei5 dei6 loeng5 go3 zan1 hai6 jat1 go3 daai6 sai3 lou6 lai4
cards.english: You two are really like little kids.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 爺爺，快啲同狗爺爺道歉啦
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 faai3 di1 tung4 gau2 je4 je2 dou6 hip3 laa1
cards.english: Grandpa, hurry and apologize to Grandpa Dog.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 我…頭先叫你做海狗真係好對唔住啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tau4 sin1 giu3 nei5 zou6 hoi2 gau2 zan1 hai6 hou2 deoi3 m4 zyu6 aa3
cards.english: I... I'm really sorry for calling you a sea dog earlier.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 爺爺，你都同豬爺爺佢道歉啦
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 nei5 dou1 tung4 zyu1 je4 je4 keoi5 dou6 hip3 laa1
cards.english: Grandpa, you should apologize to Grandpa Pig too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 我…叫你做水皮豬都好對唔住
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 nei5 zou6 seoi2 pei4 zyu1 dou1 hou2 deoi3 m4 zyu6
cards.english: I... I'm really sorry for calling you a lousy pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.jyutping: gam2 mai5 hou2 lo1 hou2 laa1 gau2 je4 je4
cards.english: That's good, okay, Grandpa Dog.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 你做下好心，拖我哋返去得嗎？
cards.jyutping: nei5 zou6 haa6 hou2 sam1 to1 ngo5 dei6 faan1 heoi3 dak1 maa1
cards.english: Please, can you tow us back?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E48 Grandpa Pig's Boat［豬爺爺的船］
cards.characters: 呢一個係我嘅榮幸嚟㗎，豬嫲嫲
